codeReview.summary: The original feature now has its previously identified blocking gaps covered by follow-up fixes in the milestone branch. Guest access and callback-preserving auth gating were implemented in the original commit, and the current codebase also contains the missing account-surface and listing-surface trust architecture plus conditional trust badge rendering on detail pages, so no blocking issues remain against the original feature requirements in this rerun context.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The marketplace-worker skill requires agent-browser verification, but the original worker completed this feature with only curl/http checks and no interactive browser evidence in the handoff.

summary: Scrutiny pass in rerun context: the original guest-browsing foundation behavior remains intact, and the subsequent milestone fixes now cover the previously missing conditional badge logic, account trust coverage, and listing-page trust architecture. The only remaining note is a shared-state/process gap: the original worker handoff omitted the skill-required agent-browser evidence.
